title: Rolling mill motor bearing risk
query: Main drive motor has high vibration, rising temperature, bearing noise, and lubrication pressure is low.

title: Caster hydraulic pressure drop
query: Hydraulic pump pressure is dropping and oil particle count is abnormal. Caster segment is showing unstable movement.

title: Blast furnace ID fan vibration
query: ID fan vibration crossed alarm limit with bearing noise. Need risk and immediate actions.

title: Normal rolling mill health check
query: Routine health check. Motor temperature, vibration, current, and lubrication pressure are normal.
